bio: I'm Charlie Erker — an engineer and builder with a business mind. I care about understanding systems at a deep level and using that understanding to build things that matter.
My work sits at the overlap of technical depth and strategic clarity — whether that's shipping product, navigating organizations, or thinking through hard problems from first principles.
Outside of work I'm drawn to questions about how things scale, why some ideas compound and others don't, and what it actually takes to build something lasting.
